note: SRER site-level plant diversity (DP1.10058.001, 2024 growing season). SRER_048 is a Vegetation-Structure plot and is not itself a diversity plot, so this is the site's ground + herbaceous layer as context for the interspaces.

provenance.productName: Plant presence and percent cover (NEON TOS)
provenance.scope: site-level (SRER_048 is a Vegetation Structure plot, not a diversity plot)
provenance.accessed_basis: first commit of this file (91bc858, 2026-07-19 23:41 UTC)
provenance.release_basis: built from a live API query rather than a pinned NEON release; vintage not captured at build time
provenance.ground_pct_sum_note: These are mean per-subplot cover shares and do not form a closed budget: they sum to 100.8%, not 100%. Read each class on its own, not as a share of a whole.
